title: melissa axillaris
intro: Melissa axillaris, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety due to its content of rosmarinic acid, a natural anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of Melissa axillaris include relief from insomnia, digestive issues, and sore throats, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Melissa axillaris can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or added to skincare products, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and calmness.
